feedback_text: Gate agents gave no updates during a four-hour delay and the app kept showing conflicting information.
My flight was cancelled after midnight and the rebooking line was impossible. I was stranded overnight with no hotel guidance.
The bag never arrived and customer service bounced me between the baggage desk and phone support.
Rebooking in the app was easy and the agent was helpful, but I still lost half a day.
The refund took weeks and the voucher policy was confusing.
Clear text alerts helped during the delay, but baggage delivery was slow once I landed.
No one could explain why the flight was cancelled and the only option was a refund request form.
The departure kept moving every thirty minutes with no proactive communication from the airline.
I missed my connection and the standby process was confusing, though the kiosk eventually worked.
Lost luggage was delivered two days later, but getting status updates was painful.
Customer support finally processed the refund and apologized, which helped.
The crew was kind, but the five-hour delay and lack of meal vouchers made the experience frustrating.
